description_long: This cake features a smooth, glossy black dome as its main body, adorned with evenly spaced, round, light brown macaron-like decorations around its base. At the top, a dramatic, sculpted dark chocolate shard rises at an angle, adding a striking visual element. The cake sits on a flat, dark rectangular base, which appears to be a serving board or tray. The surface of the dome is highly polished, reflecting light and giving it a luxurious appearance. The macarons provide a contrasting texture and color, enhancing the cake's visual appeal. The overall design is modern and minimalist, with a focus on clean lines and bold contrasts.
description: A glossy black dome cake with light brown macarons around the base and a dramatic dark chocolate shard on top, presented on a dark serving tray. The design is modern and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view shows the glossy black dome, three light brown macarons at the base, and the angled chocolate shard prominently on top.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side of the cake, with the chocolate shard angled to the left and two macarons visible at the base.
description_view_2: The back view displays the dome with three macarons at the base and the chocolate shard seen from behind, showing its sculpted edge.
description_view_3: This side view shows the chocolate shard angled to the right and two macarons at the base, mirroring the opposite side.
